description: The sign() implementation pre-hashes in software with SHA-256, then passes the digest to TPM2_Sign with SignatureScheme::Null and a null-hierarchy HashcheckTicket (TPM2_ST_HASHCHECK tag, TPM2_RH_NULL hierarchy, empty digest). This is the correct pattern for unrestricted signing keys with externally-computed digests per TPM 2.0 spec Part 3, Section 18.4. SignatureScheme::Null causes the TPM to use the key's built-in scheme. The software pre-hash eliminates the MaxBuffer size limit. No issue.
title: sign() HashcheckTicket approach is correct
